title: App output context engine
mission: Build an offline engine that parses supplied application output, minimizes and redacts it, compares it with the prompt-kit registry, and emits compact agent instructions with an honest proof ceiling.
safeParallelWork: Review and rebase the existing prompt-registry consumer without editing this branch
Windows Profile implementation outside app-output context paths
Provider routing work outside context engine manifests and catalogs
ownedScope: schema workflow skill capability trigger and artifact registration
focused validator fixtures CI operator documentation and public plan
forbiddenScope: governance contract or P00 policy changes
source-application execution attachment focus or mutation
provider calls prompt execution product code secrets customer data and raw runtime logs
launcher implementation deployment merge release destructive Git and default-branch mutation
expectedArtifacts: central harness registrations and validation evidence

tasks.title: Build deterministic contextualizer
acceptanceCriteria: Hash but do not persist raw output
Redact common credentials and private identifiers
Rank only prompts on the requested surface
evidence: Dependency-free Python fixture suite passes locally

tasks.title: Register workflow and artifacts
inputs: existing manifest artifact registry graph skill capability and trigger patterns
outputs: schema workflow skill registrations graph nodes and artifact contracts
acceptanceCriteria: Fresh agent can discover the engine
Aggregate observer can reach every required node
Generated artifacts remain untracked and outside the repository
evidence: Tracked harness component set committed and pushed to the isolated remote branch

tasks.title: Validate and deliver
acceptanceCriteria: Pull request records proof level and ceiling
evidence: Pull request #38 opened against the verified PR #37 head
Remote branch and tracked component files exist

proof.target: Tracked and discoverable app-output contextualization harness with deterministic fixture proof and aggregate registration
proof.achieved: The engine, schema, workflow, skill, registries, fixtures, focused validator, aggregate graph integration, CI, documentation, branch, and PR exist. Local fixture proof passed; GitHub exact-head checks remain in progress.
proof.ceiling: No source application was executed, no provider was contacted, no selected prompt was executed, and no runtime or target behavior is proven.

handoff.nextOwner: Prompt-kit integration and router convergence lane
notes: The engine consumes the generic ai-harness-prompt-registry/v1 contract.
The full V38 snapshot remains owned by the separate prompt-registry consumer PR #29.
Re-inspect the current stack before rebasing or integrating overlapping catalog and manifest files.
